mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_ip_whitelist (community_id, ip_address, ip_range, operation_type, description, status, create_admin_id, create_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{communityId}, #{ipAddress}, #{ipRange}, #{operationType}, #{description}, #{status}, #{createAdminId}, #{createTime}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT id, community_id, ip_address, ip_range, operation_type, description, status, create_admin_id, create_time, update_time FROM sys_ip_whitelist WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, community_id, ip_address, ip_range, operation_type, description, status, create_admin_id, create_time FROM sys_ip_whitelist WHERE operation_type = #{operationType} AND status = 'active' AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, community_id, ip_address, ip_range, operation_type, description, status, create_admin_id, create_time FROM sys_ip_whitelist WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_ip_whitelist SET is_deleted = 1, deleted_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
